g.text: Split/merge channels, merge docs, swap, tile.
Pseudo color, smart crop, grid arrange, batch I/O.
Line profile, Z-projection, stamp, layer cleanup.
Border, midlines, edge guides, clear guides.
Quick-insert saved text snippets to layers.
Resize by width, height, percentage, or DPI.
Add styled text with font, size, color control.
Draw lines, arrows, brackets with grid presets.
Add calibrated scale bars with labels and units.
Create magnified inset panels from selections.
Auto-label panels A, B, C… with grid layout.
Batch edit font, size, color of text layers.
Draw lines and arrows with custom styling.
